category_sources: Official gRPC Java generated-code docs document Java gRPC code generation with protoc-gen-grpc-java.
source_facts.description says this is a protoc plugin for gRPC Java.
display_name_sources: Official gRPC Java docs name the plugin artifact protoc-gen-grpc-java.
docs_sources: Official gRPC Java basics tutorial covers generating Java gRPC client and server code.
Official gRPC Java generated-code reference documents grpc-java codegen and direct protoc plugin invocation.
Official grpc-java repository README is the source documentation entry point.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/grpc/grpc-java, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official gRPC Java generated-code docs show protobuf/gRPC Java code generation using protoc-gen-grpc-java.
source_facts.description identifies a gRPC Java protoc plugin.
